Class Game

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
model.Game
public class Game extends Observable
Main game model used to manage the profiles (up to 8), the leaderboard and starting/ending/restarting the Play. Also, as Observable, notifies every Observer associated to a certain change.

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Update the current game

    • start

      public void start(Play p)
      Start a game with the given Play
      Parameters:
      p - New Play

    • end

      public void end()
      Ends the current game updating the amount of plays, win and lose and if has a result (WIN or LOST) updates the leaderboard

    • restart

      public void restart(Play p)
      Restart the game, stopping the previous one if was in progress and starting a new one
      Parameters:
      p - New Play

    • changeProfile

      public void changeProfile(int index)
      Switch the current profile
      Parameters:
      index - Choose the profile in the given index of the list

      Resets the stats of the current profile
